channel.title: Occidental Square Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Occidental Square Events

item.title: First Thursday Sunset Markets
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Occidental Square, 117 S Washington St., Seattle, WA undefined

Stop by the Sunset Market during Art Walk to shop unique and vintage treasures, every First Thursday! Check out the market every month from 5-9 p.m., featuring new surprises from rotating vendors. The market will pop up on the following dates: April 2 May 7 June 4 July 3 Aug. 6 Sept. 3 Oct. 1 Event image: https://downtownseattle.org/app/uploads/2026/03/events-sunset-market-1.jpg

Event details

item.title: Occidental Square Trading Post
item.description:
Saturday, April 25, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Occidental Square, 117 S Washington St., Seattle, WA undefined

The Occidental Square Trading Post returns for 2026! This outdoor market in the heart of historic Pioneer Square features local vendors selling handmade, antique and vintage goods. Watch out for updates on Instagram. The market will pop up in Occidental Square on the following dates from noon-6 p.m.: April 25 May 30 Sept. 12 Oct. 17 Dec. 12 Event image: https://downtownseattle.org/app/uploads/2025/09/events-occ-market-2025.jpg

Event details
